title: FullStory User
description: A user in FullStory representing an individual whose sessions, events, and behavioral data are tracked. Users can be anonymous or identified with an external uid.

id.description: The FullStory-assigned unique identifier for the user

uid.description: The external user identifier provided by the integrating system. Omit to create an anonymous user.

display_name.description: The display name for the user shown in the FullStory interface

email.description: The email address associated with the user

properties.description: Custom key-value properties attached to the user profile. In v2, type suffixes are not required as types are inferred automatically.

schema.description: Optional explicit type declarations for custom properties to override default type inference

type_conflicts.description: Any type conflicts detected in custom properties where inferred types do not match declared types

app_url.description: URL to view the user profile in the FullStory application

CreateUserRequest.description: Request body for creating or updating a user via the Server API

uid.description: External user identifier. Omit to create an anonymous user.

display_name.description: The display name for the user

email.description: The email address for the user

properties.description: Custom key-value properties to attach to the user

schema.description: Optional explicit type declarations for custom properties
